column1: •  All data points are documented. You don't need every endpoint — pick what you actually need.
•  Inputs marked 'Y' under Required must be supplied; 'N' have sensible defaults.
•  If the brief calls for something not listed, propose how you'd extend the data layer.
•  Auth / rate limits / pagination are out of scope — assume they Just Work.
